subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1910-01-19
subcodes.first_line: The education of children is a mighty service. They must needs be educated through divine training, lest they be swayed by desires [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تربیت اطفال خدمت بزرگی است باید که بتربیت الهی تربیت کرد که هوائی در نیاید
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @Moses, @Manifestation of God as educator, @Muhammad; Islam, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @need for an educator, @Christ; Christianity
